# Cardzy: Digital Wish Cards & Event Invitations

> Cardzy is a global web application for creating interactive, animated digital wish cards and multi-event invitation websites with WhatsApp RSVP tracking, Google Maps integration, live countdown timers, and support for 18 international languages.

## Key Pages & Tools

- [Cardzy Homepage](https://cardzy.online): Create animated digital wish cards and full event invitation websites.
- [Create Digital Wish Card](https://cardzy.online/create-wish): Create custom animated greeting cards for Eid, Birthdays, Anniversaries, and 34+ occasions.
- [Create Event Invitation Website](https://cardzy.online/create-invitation): Build full invitation websites for Shaadi, Mehndi, Baraat, Walima, Nikkah, and private events with RSVP tracking.
- [Eid Mubarak Cards & Invitations](https://cardzy.online/eid-mubarak-cards): Specialized Ramadan & Eid Mubarak animated cards with Urdu Nastaliq & Arabic typography.
- [Pricing & Plans](https://cardzy.online/pricing): View Free ($0), Pro ($4 / PKR 1,100), and Business ($18 / PKR 5,000) tiers.
- [Guides & Help Center](https://cardzy.online/guide): Event planning guides, Pakistani wedding invitation etiquette, and wording ideas.
- [FAQ](https://cardzy.online/faq): Frequently asked questions about digital cards, RSVP tracking, payments (EasyPaisa, JazzCash, Cards), and custom domain links.
- [Instagram Campaign](https://cardzy.online/campaign): Official social media media kit, 5-slide carousel assets, and branding guidelines.

## Core Capabilities

- **3D Animated Card Opening**: Realistic envelope unboxing animations with custom background music, confetti, and floating particles.
- **Multilingual Support (18 Languages)**: English, Urdu (اردو), Arabic (العربية), Spanish, French, Hindi, Chinese, Portuguese, Russian, German, Japanese, Korean, Italian, Turkish, Indonesian, Bengali, Vietnamese, and Swahili.
- **Interactive Event Features**: 1-click WhatsApp RSVP management, live countdown timers, Google Maps venue navigation pins, dress code notes, and gift registry links.
- **Instant Digital Delivery**: Share via WhatsApp, SMS, Email, Instagram, or download high-resolution PNG image cards.

## Contact & Legal

- Contact Email: cardzyonline@gmail.com

- Privacy Policy: https://cardzy.online/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://cardzy.online/terms
